name: Server Station
description: Server-facing shift workspace. Tracks active tables, shift performance, sales, and tips across the current shift.

page_briefs.shift: Dashboard KPI grid showing current shift metrics: active tables, covers served, sales total, tip percentage, and average ticket. Activity feed below streams recent events (table seated, check closed, comp applied) tied to the server.
page_briefs.tips: Chart grid visualizing tip trends by day, shift, and cover count. Below, a data table listing each closed check with party size, sales amount, tip amount, tip percentage, and payment method. Running totals at the footer.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for server operations
